name: Blacktail Studio
oneLine: Portland-based custom woodworker who became YouTube's go-to teacher for live-edge epoxy river tables.
bio: Cam Anderson is a former helicopter pilot turned custom woodworker who founded Blacktail Studio in Portland, Oregon and began posting woodworking videos in 2018. He went full-time on YouTube in 2020. His epoxy build tutorials have accumulated over 90 million views and pushed the channel past one million subscribers. Tables that once sold for $900 now go for $10,000 to over $30,000, and he runs a paid Epoxy Workshop course alongside the free YouTube tutorials.
style: long-form single-project build vlogs with detailed material/cost talk and macro pour shots
notable: viral 'first epoxy table I ruined' origin video
